A candid documentary-style photograph of a small roadside tea stall during light rain in rural Karnataka, India. A middle-aged shopkeeper wearing a faded blue sweater is carefully repairing an old red transistor radio with a screwdriver while simultaneously serving tea. On the counter are scattered handwritten Kannada notes, a half-open toolbox, a cracked green thermos, and a vintage wall clock showing 4:17 PM. A wet brown dog is sleeping under a wooden bench. Rain droplets are visible on the camera lens. In the background, a yellow school bus passes through muddy roads. Natural overcast lighting, realistic skin textures, authentic imperfections, photojournalism quality, ultra-detailed, 35mm documentary photography, shallow depth of field, no stock-photo composition, no posed subjects, realistic weather effects.

A realistic photograph of a mechanic repairing a bright purple bicycle while standing on a rooftop covered with blue solar panels. A white goat wearing a red scarf is looking into a mirror attached to a water tank. Three orange buckets are arranged in a perfect triangle. A kite is stuck on a nearby antenna. The wall behind the mechanic contains clearly readable Kannada text saying "ನಿಕ್ ಟೆಸ್ಟ್ 2026". Golden hour lighting, photorealistic, documentary photography.
